creator: peterbe@sonic.net
text:
After this, I installed the xf86-video-savage-2.1.3_1 X.Org savage 
display driver, created a skeleton xorg.conf file using 'Xorg 
-configure', and added display sweep and resolution settings to that, 
based on an installation of Ubuntu Linux which is installed on the same 
system. Now it works well with the savage driver.
